instruction: 帮我把IT资产登记到资产台账

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'IT资产登记
资产编号：IT-2025-00456
资产类型：笔记本电脑
品牌型号：ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen11
序列号：SN20250312001
采购日期：2025-03-12
采购价格：12800元
使用部门：研发部
使用人：姜浩' > /home/user/Desktop/it_asset.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = '资产编号'; ws['B1'] = '类型'; ws['C1'] = '品牌型号'; ws['D1'] = '序列号'; ws['E1'] = '采购价(元)'; ws['F1'] = '使用人'; ws['G1'] = '部门'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/asset_register.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: 帮我把IT资产登记到资产台账
把/home/user/Desktop/it_asset.txt里的资产信息填入/home/user/Desktop/asset_register.xlsx的第2行：A2='IT-2025-00456'，B2='笔记本电脑'，C2='ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen11'，D2='SN20250312001'，E2=12800，F2='姜浩'，G2='研发部'，保存

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/asset_register.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'IT-2025-00456' in s else 'FAILED')"
